name: NC Server White Paper -- DRAFT
description: This draft white paper describes the NC Server from Network Computer, Inc. (NCI), a platform enabling network computing via a three-tier architecture of OS substrate, required system services, and NC applications. The document details NC components including initialization (BOOTP/DHCP), authentication (smart card), file system (NFS), print services, and applications (Oracle-based productivity tools, web server, mail, billing). The NC Server is positioned as a low-cost, centrally managed alternative to desktop PCs.
